title: AI Chat v2 Released
description: Upgraded the AI chat engine with faster response times, context awareness across your entire workspace, and support for file attachments.

title: Dashboard Performance Improvements
description: Reduced dashboard load times by 60% through optimized database queries and client-side caching.

title: New Onboarding Flow
description: Simplified the onboarding questionnaire from 25 questions to 8 focused prompts that build your initial AI strategy.
